title: Panchang Upcoming Observance DOM Targeting Fix Record
corrections: Upcoming Observance updater no longer uses broad destructive parent-container targeting.
Updater now finds the observance card at runtime by its heading.
Updater appends or updates one dedicated basis line without replacing existing content.
Existing observance card content and surrounding page assets are preserved.
Panchang preview continues to update the existing Panchang table.
